problem id: 75b509ad
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  11011000 -> 01010110
  10010010 -> 11101100
  00001000 -> 00100010
  10100001 -> 11101100
  10001110 -> 10011011
  11110110 -> 01100101
  01111011 -> 00110010
  01011001 -> 00110010
  01001111 -> 11101111
  00100010 -> 00000000

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 01100100
